description: Output of the planner agent. One directive per orchestrator tick. The deterministic harness clamps time_budget_hours to the remaining deadline and refuses any step whose projected spend would cross the hard cap, regardless of these values.

terminal_decision.description: continue = run the execution agent with the directive below; complete = the project goal is genuinely achieved, halt and request shutdown; escalate = a human decision is required, halt and wait.

stage.description: The phase this directive belongs to.

executor_prompt.description: Path (repo-relative) to the executor prompt the harness should run for this stage, e.g. codex/prompts/01_scientific_pilot.md or codex/prompts/diagnose_and_fix.md.

task_instruction.description: Concrete, specific instruction appended to the executor prompt for this tick: what to build/run/fix next and the success criterion.

time_budget_hours.description: Wall-clock budget granted to the execution agent for this tick. Small for early exploration, generous for the final run (e.g. ~6h for a ~3.5h run). The harness clamps this to the time remaining before the overall deadline.

expected_cost_usd.description: Planner estimate of the incremental spend for this tick. Used by the harness to refuse steps that would cross the hard cap.

rationale.description: Why this is the right next action given elapsed/remaining time, cumulative cost, and the last executor decision.
